channel.title: The Verifyco Blog
channel.description: Guides and research on detecting deepfakes, AI-generated and manipulated media.

item.title: How to Tell If an Image Is AI-Generated
item.description: A practical, forensic checklist for spotting AI-generated images — from telltale visual artifacts to the metadata and signals that actually hold up.

item.title: What Is a Deepfake? A Plain-English Guide
item.description: Deepfakes explained simply: how they're made, why they've gotten so convincing, and the practical ways to tell a synthetic face or voice from the real thing.

item.title: 5 Signs a Video Has Been Deepfaked
item.description: A quick, practical checklist for spotting deepfaked video — the edge artifacts, lip-sync drift and lighting tells that still give synthetic clips away.

item.title: On-Device Verification, Explained (Nothing Leaves Your iPhone)
item.description: Why Verifyco runs entirely on your iPhone — how on-device forensic analysis works, what the Neural Engine does, and why nothing is ever uploaded.
